title: Fees for Right to Sell Drugs for Human Use - Canada.ca
content:
## Fees for the right to sell drugs for human use
Fees for the right to sell drugs for human use as of April 1, 2026
Fee as of April 1, 2025
Fee as of April 1, 2026
The annual fee for the right to sell a drug (disinfectant, non-prescription drug, or a drug other than one referred to earlier) for which a drug identification number has been assigned under section C.01.014.2 (1) of the Food and Drug Regulations
Non-prescription drug
Drug other than one referred to in item 1 or 2
Please visit Fees for Human Drugs for relevant guidance documents and forms.
